name: Incline Pushup
formCues: Straight line from head to heels

name: Seated Dumbbell Shoulder Press
formCues: Press straight up, don't flare elbows out wide

name: Standing Dumbbell Shoulder Press
formCues: Don't lean back to assist the press

name: Reverse Fly
formCues: Lead with elbows out to sides
Squeeze shoulder blades together at top

name: Renegade Row
formCues: Row one arm at a time

name: Speed Rope Intervals
formCues: Wrists do the work, not arms
Light on the balls of feet

name: Step Jacks
formCues: Step out wide to each side

name: Dead Bug
formCues: Opposite arm and leg extend slowly

name: Gentle Mobility Flow
formCues: Gentle standing or seated spinal twists — 5 each side
Move slowly through each movement, no forcing

name: Sit-to-Stand
formCues: Hands optional on thighs for support

name: Supported Hinge
formCues: Hands on thighs for support if needed

name: Wall Pushup
formCues: Hands at shoulder height on wall

name: Incline Pushup
formCues: Straight line from head to heels

name: Floor Press
formCues: Upper arms rest lightly on floor each rep

name: Seated Row Motion (No Weight)
formCues: Squeeze shoulder blades, no weight needed

name: Supported Squat
formCues: Hold a sturdy surface for support

name: Standing Scapular Wall Slide
formCues: Back against wall, arms in W position
Slide arms up into Y, keep contact with wall

name: Bench-Supported Single-Arm Row
formCues: Support on bench with free hand
Control the lower, no torso rotation

name: Standing Glute Squeeze
formCues: Stand tall, hold support if needed

name: Standing Hip Abduction (Wall-Supported)
formCues: Hold wall or sturdy surface for balance
Lift leg out to the side with control

name: Side-Lying Leg Lift
formCues: Lift top leg with control, no swinging

name: Quadruped Hip Extension
formCues: Extend one leg back and up, knee bent
Lower with control, keep hips square

name: Bench-Supported Hip Thrust
formCues: Upper back on bench, feet flat on floor
Drive hips up, squeeze glutes at top

name: Standing Hip Hinge (Bodyweight)
formCues: Soft knees, hinge at the hips
Keep back flat, short range of motion

name: Wall-Supported Hip Hinge
formCues: Hold wall or sturdy surface for balance
Hinge at hips, short controlled range

name: Seated Forward Hinge (Gentle Stretch)
formCues: Sit tall, hinge gently forward from the hips
Don't force the range of motion

name: Bench-Supported Light RDL
formCues: Free hand resting on bench for balance
Soft knees, hinge at hips, short range
